control_text: Back up the patient records database at least once every 24 hours. The most recent successful backup must be no more than 1 day old at the time evidence is collected.
notes: The harness freezes collected_at at 2026-07-17T00:00:00Z, so max_age_days measures against that instant (attest/engine/predicates.py): the positive backup is 4 hours old, the negative 17 days. frequency_hours supports an lte 24 check.
